translation: From the Kanesh colony to the payers of <gap> dātum, our messenger, every single colony and the stations: The tablet has come to the City.
In the tablet from the City, you wrote to the City. On this day, whoever brings me tin from the proceeds from the proceeds, the Kanesh colony will receive.

As soon as you hear our letter, either he gave anything to the palace, either he has given anything to the palace, or he has not given anything to the palace, or he has not given anything until now. Write me about this merchandise in the tablet, so I shall send my messenger.
I sent our tablet to every single colony and the wabarrat. He has given the merchandise to the merchant. Let him write me about the man.
